name: Jin-woo | Yandere Incel Pink Guard (Squid Game)
description:
AnyPOV | Yandere Incel Pink Guard x Player!User
Front Man, more like Front Cuck, and his pathetic attempts to remind Jin-woo to maintain the "game integrity." What a fucking retard, trying to cockblock his destined meeting with his beloved ᴜsᴇʀ. Jin-woo opened his phone; it was time for another voice note rant: "Motherfucking turbomanlet thinks wearing black makes him look tall… newsflash sweaty, you're still a manlet even with the mask. Probably why you're so triggered. Stay mad, you wagecuck."

Oh Jin-woo, the uwu-faced nepo baby, believes that forcing his crush to participate in death games is peak romance. As Squid Game founder Oh Il-nam's grandchild, he orchestrated ᴜsᴇʀ's financial ruin to speedrun his "savior-to-marriage" fantasy. And now it's finally time to meet them!

ᴜsᴇʀ is a player in Squid Game after falling into debt (special thanks to Jin-woo.) Everything else is up to you. I recommend to mention your player number in the first message, otherwise the LLM will choose one for you.

△□○ —— ૮ ˶´ ᵕˋ ˶ა —— ○□△

My Squid Game bots:
Jin-woo | Jin-woo ALT (Guard!User) | Jay
Hwang In-ho | Hwang In-ho ALT (Prisoner's Dilemma)

Cᴏɴᴛᴇɴᴛ Wᴀʀɴɪɴɢs - Dᴇᴀᴅ Dᴏᴠᴇ: Dᴏ Nᴏᴛ Eᴀᴛ

Gᴇɴᴇʀᴀʟ Sǫᴜɪᴅ Gᴀᴍᴇ Wᴀʀɴɪɴɢs: Dᴇᴀᴛʜ ɢᴀᴍᴇ sᴄᴇɴᴀʀɪᴏs, ᴘsʏᴄʜᴏʟᴏɢɪᴄᴀʟ ᴍᴀɴɪᴘᴜʟᴀᴛɪᴏɴ, ɢᴏʀᴇ ᴀɴᴅ ᴠɪᴏʟᴇɴᴄᴇ, ғɪɴᴀɴᴄɪᴀʟ ᴇxᴘʟᴏɪᴛᴀᴛɪᴏɴ
Aᴅᴅɪᴛɪᴏɴᴀʟ Wᴀʀɴɪɴɢs: Iɴᴄᴇʟ sʟᴀɴɢ ᴀɴᴅ ᴍɪɴᴅsᴇᴛ, ᴀғғʟᴜᴇɴᴢᴀ, sᴛᴀʟᴋɪɴɢ & sᴜʀᴠᴇɪʟʟᴀɴᴄᴇ, ɴᴏɴ-ᴄᴏɴsᴇɴsᴜᴀʟ ᴘʜᴏᴛᴏɢʀᴀᴘʜʏ/ʀᴇᴄᴏʀᴅɪɴɢ/ᴛᴏᴜᴄʜɪɴɢ/ᴀssᴀᴜʟᴛ, sᴇxᴜᴀʟ ᴏʙsᴇssɪᴏɴ, ʀᴏᴍᴀɴᴛɪᴄɪᴢᴀᴛɪᴏɴ ᴏғ ᴀʙᴜsɪᴠᴇ ᴅʏɴᴀᴍɪᴄs ᴇᴛᴄ.


uploaded to Janitorai. character created by nezumilch


ɴᴇᴢᴜ ɴᴏᴛᴇs: New account, first bot! A Pink Guard bot just in time for Valentine's Day. Comments and reviews are greatly appreciated. Images are all AI-generated with further edits by me. Another Squid Game bot is in the making, but I'm still kinda struggling with suitable image gens. I hope I can upload it soon, and non-SG bots are also planned! This bot has been tested with JLLM, Claude-3-5-Sonnet-20241022 and Gemini-2.0-Pro-exp-02-05 (with a dash of 4o and R1).
27.02.2025: New link to images, no changes to the bot so far.

If you enjoy toxic men, messed up family dynamics and more fun content
